content.speakerText: We'll be in touch within two weeks. Thanks again for your time and passion today.
content.speakerTextCn: 两周内我们会通知你。再次感谢你今天的时间与热忱。

options.text: Thank you so much for this opportunity—I'm truly honored and excited to hear back!
I don't care if you call me or not.
Can you give me the job now?

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了感激之情并传递了积极期待，符合面试结束时的礼貌与专业形象。选项1虽然礼貌但过于简单，缺乏情感深度；选项3和4态度失当，不符合面试礼仪。

content.speakerText: Is there anything you'd like to add before we wrap up?
content.speakerTextCn: 在结束前，你还有什么想补充的吗？

options.text: Nope, I think I covered everything.
Actually, I didn't do anything worth mentioning.
Can you tell me if I got the job yet?
I want to talk about my favorite movie.

content.explanation: 正确答案是简洁、得体的回应，符合面试收尾的规范。选项2自我贬低，削弱个人形象；选项3过早追问结果，显得急躁；选项4完全偏离主题，缺乏专业性。

content.speakerText: Thank you for the interview today. We really enjoyed meeting you.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今天的面试，我们很高兴认识你。

options.text: I really appreciate your time and the opportunity to learn more about your team. I’m looking forward to the next steps!
So... when will I get the offer?
You're welcome. I guess that's it.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了情感词（appreciate, looking forward）和专业表达，留下积极印象。选项1和4过于随意，缺乏热情；选项3急于求成，破坏礼貌氛围。

content.template: Thank you so much for this ___—I'm truly honored and excited to hear back!
content.hint: 表达感谢时，常用 'this opportunity' 指代面试机会
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：this opportunity（表达感谢的核心搭配）

content.template: Actually, yes—I recently won a local innovation award that wasn't on my ___.
content.hint: 面试中提到未列入的成就，通常指未写在什么文件上？
content.knowledgePoint: 核心词汇：resume（简历，面试场景高频词）

content.template: I really appreciate your ___ and the chance to learn more about your company.
content.hint: 面试结束时，最常感谢的是对方的什么？
content.knowledgePoint: 惯用搭配：appreciate your time（表达感谢的固定句型）

content.speakerText: We'll be in touch within two weeks. Thanks again for your time and passion today.
content.speakerTextCn: 两周内我们会通知你。再次感谢你今天的时间与热忱。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much for this opportunity—I'm truly honored and excited to hear back!
I really appreciate your time and the chance to interview. Looking forward to your update!
Thanks for everything! I'm grateful for the chance and eager to hear the results.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢和积极期待
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 opportunity / time / appreciate / look forward 等关键词

content.speakerText: Is there anything you'd like to add before we wrap up?
content.speakerTextCn: 在结束前，你还有什么想补充的吗？
expectedAnswers: Actually, yes—I recently won a local innovation award that wasn't on my resume. I’d be happy to share more if you're interested.
No, I think I've covered everything important.
Nothing else to add, but I just want to reiterate how excited I am about this role.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了补充请求，不冗长也不消极
语言准确性：语法结构是否完整，用词是否专业
表达自然度：是否自然流畅，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 actually, add, resume, excited 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thank you for your time today. We'll be in touch soon.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今天的时间，我们会尽快与你联系。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much—I really enjoyed learning about your team and am very excited about the possibility of joining!
I appreciate the opportunity and your consideration. Looking forward to hearing from you!
Thanks for the interview! It was a great experience and I’m hopeful for a positive update.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否有效表达感谢并留下积极印象
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的动词和连接词（e.g., appreciate, looking forward）
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度夸张的表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 thank you, opportunity, excited, looking forward 等核心表达
